title: Podzapytania w FROM (derived tables)
intro: Buduj tymczasowe zestawy danych i zapytuj je jak tabelę.
explanation: Podzapytanie w FROM tworzy derived table. Musi mieć alias. Przydatne do etapowego liczenia agregatów.

examples.query: SELECT t.customer_id, t.total_orders FROM (SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id) t WHERE t.total_orders >= 3;
SELECT x.category_id, x.max_price FROM (SELECT category_id, MAX(price) AS max_price FROM products GROUP BY category_id) x;

exercise: Zwróć kraje, które mają więcej niż 10 użytkowników, używając podzapytania w FROM.
solutionHints: W podzapytaniu policz użytkowników per country.
expectedQueryPatterns: FROM \(SELECT country, COUNT\(\*\) AS total FROM users GROUP BY country\)

validation.expectedSql: SELECT country, total FROM (SELECT country, COUNT(*) AS total FROM users GROUP BY country) AS country_totals WHERE total > 10

starterQuery: SELECT t.customer_id, t.total_orders FROM (SELECT customer_id, COUNT(*) AS total_orders FROM orders GROUP BY customer_id) t WHERE t.total_orders >= 3;
